provider: The Education University of Hong Kong 2026/27 Undergraduate Programme Course List

supplements.evidenceNote: The official 2026/27 BA(CDA) course-list PDF publishes course codes, titles and curriculum groups for the shared curriculum and separately labels the Music-only and Visual-Arts-only courses. This JS8686 supplement includes the shared courses and the Visual Arts courses, excludes MUS1346 and the five Music Subject Focus courses marked for Music students only, and retains MUS1213 because the official PDF lists it in the shared Major Elective Courses group. The linked official course synopsis pages independently confirm the codes and English course identities of all 29 included entries; the course-list PDF remains the source for the displayed English titles and curriculum groups. The PDF does not publish per-course credit points or a recommended year/semester study pattern, so credits, recommendedYear and semester are intentionally left unknown. The programme page publishes only domain-level credit totals, including an uncoded 3-cp Cross-Faculty Core Course, and those aggregates are not allocated to individual courses here. Uncoded programme domains are omitted, and this supplement preserves the two official Final Year Project paths without asserting graduation completion.
